entities.name: MGNREGS
entities.description: National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme introduced in 2006 to provide rural employment

entities.name: FARM WAGE RATE
entities.description: The rate of payment for agricultural labor

entities.name: FARM PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The financial return on foodgrain production

entities.name: COST OF CULTIVATION SURVEY
entities.description: A data collection method used to analyze the costs of farming

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on MGNREGS and foodgrain profitability was conducted

entities.name: PADDY
entities.description: A foodgrain crop analyzed for profitability

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A foodgrain crop analyzed for profitability

entities.name: JOWAR
entities.description: A foodgrain crop analyzed for profitability

entities.name: BENGAL GRAM
entities.description: A foodgrain crop analyzed for profitability

entities.name: PIGEON PEAS
entities.description: A foodgrain crop analyzed for profitability

entities.name: HAHP STATES
entities.description: States characterized by high area and high productivity

entities.name: HALP STATES
entities.description: States characterized by high area and low productivity

entities.name: HUMAN LABOUR COST
entities.description: The real cost incurred for human labor in crop cultivation

entities.name: COST C2
entities.description: The cost of cultivation including the imputed value of family labour

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield per unit area

relationships.description: MGNREGS is hypothesized to have increased the farm wage rate
Increased farm wage rates are hypothesized to reduce farm profitability
The study analyzes if MGNREGS reduced the profitability of foodgrain crops
Data from the cost of cultivation survey was used to analyze profitability
The profitability of paddy was analyzed in the study
The profitability of wheat was analyzed in the study
The profitability of jowar was analyzed in the study
The profitability of bengal gram was analyzed in the study
The profitability of pigeon peas was analyzed in the study
Profitability was analyzed across HAHP states
Profitability was analyzed across HALP states
Increased human labour cost affects the overall profitability of crops
Real profitability was calculated after subtracting COST C2
Increased productivity helped to increase the profitability of farmers
Human labour cost increased considerably during the MGNREGS period
